name: Barbers and Hair Salons
description: Barbers and hair salons serving local communities across the UK. Most rely entirely on word of mouth and have no digital presence.

name: Plumbers
description: Local plumbing businesses providing emergency callouts and installation services. Customers search online first when pipes burst.

name: Electricians
description: Qualified electricians offering domestic and commercial electrical work. NICEIC and NAPIT registered tradespeople need credible websites.

name: Roofers and Builders
description: Roofers, builders, and general contractors working across residential and commercial projects throughout the UK.

name: Cleaning Companies
description: Domestic and commercial cleaning businesses offering regular and one-off services. Repeat bookings come from clients who find them online.

name: Photographers
description: Wedding, portrait, commercial, and event photographers. A website is their portfolio and their primary booking tool.

name: Personal Trainers
description: Gym-based and mobile personal trainers offering 1-to-1 and group fitness coaching. New clients search online before committing.

name: Beauty Salons and Nail Bars
description: Beauty salons, nail technicians, and aesthetics businesses offering treatments and bookings. Online presence drives new client discovery.

name: Food Trucks and Street Food
description: Mobile food businesses, street food traders, and market stalls needing to share their schedule and menu online.

name: Cafes and Coffee Shops
description: Independent cafes and coffee shops competing against chains. A professional website signals quality and builds loyal local following.

name: Dog Groomers
description: Mobile and salon-based dog groomers serving pet owners across the UK. Booking enquiries overwhelmingly come via Google search.

name: Tattoo Studios
description: Tattoo studios and artists showcasing their portfolio and booking custom work. Clients research extensively before committing to a studio.

name: Independent Retailers
description: Independent shops, boutiques, and specialist retailers. An online presence extends reach far beyond foot traffic.

name: Driving Instructors
description: DVSA-approved driving instructors offering lessons to learners. Parents and learners search for local instructors online.

name: Accountants and Bookkeepers
description: Sole trader accountants and small bookkeeping practices. Professional credibility online converts searchers into clients.

name: Therapists and Counsellors
description: Counsellors, psychotherapists, and talking therapists in private practice. Clients choose carefully — a professional website builds trust.

name: Event DJs
description: Wedding and event DJs who need to showcase their sets, packages, and availability. Couples search and shortlist online.

name: Gardeners and Landscapers
description: Garden maintenance, landscaping, and garden design businesses. New clients come from local search and word of mouth referrals.

name: Childminders and Nurseries
description: Ofsted-registered childminders and small nurseries. Parents research online before making enquiries about childcare.

name: Solicitors and Legal Services
description: Small law firms and sole practitioner solicitors offering conveyancing, family law, wills, and immigration services.
